nasb.text: The portion of Jacob is not like these; For the Maker of all is He, And Israel is the tribe of His inheritance; The Lord of hosts is His name.

esv.text: Not like these is he who is the portion of Jacob, for he is the one who formed all things, and Israel is the tribe of his inheritance; the Lord of hosts is his name.

cnv.text: 那作雅各產業的並不像這些偶像， 因為他是萬物的創造者； 以色列是屬他的民族， 萬軍之耶和華是他的名。

ccb.text: 但雅各的上帝截然不同， 祂是万物的创造者， 被称为“万军之耶和华”， 以色列是祂的子民。
